chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-70 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.11.2025 Mr. Mumtaz Ahmed Lashari, advocate for petitioner Syed Kamran Ali, advocate for respondent(s) Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** Learned counsel for the petitioner states at Bar that petitioner is not in his contact since long, therefore, he does not press this petition for want of instructions. Accordingly petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
